estimation.accidentDeclaredDesc: Declared major incidents can impact suggested range.
estimation.actionableResultDesc: Use the range and confidence to position your listing realistically.
estimation.autonexTipDesc: A realistic starting price increases qualified contacts.
estimation.bodyStyleAutoHint: Body style suggested automatically for this model. You can change it if needed.
estimation.bodyStyleChoiceHint: This model exists in multiple body styles. Select the one that matches your vehicle.
estimation.catalogLoadingDesc: We are preparing makes and models for reliable input.
estimation.catalogUnavailableDesc: We could not load vehicle references. Check your connection, then try reloading the catalog.
estimation.conditionHistoryDesc: Accurate condition and maintenance history lead to more credible valuation.
estimation.confidenceLevelDesc: An immediate read of estimate strength.
estimation.convertReadyDesc: Once value is generated, publish immediately with a recommended price.
estimation.errorMileageRange: Mileage must be between 0 and 1,500,000 km.
estimation.errorYearRange: Year must be between 1950 and current year.
estimation.fairerEstimateDesc: These details improve estimate relevance for your vehicle profile.
estimation.higherPrecisionDesc: Condition and usage context reduce uncertainty.
estimation.howItWorksDesc: Describe your vehicle, specify condition, then receive a structured valuation report in seconds.
estimation.inputTipDesc: Clear and complete data improves estimate reliability.
estimation.landingLead: In a few steps, get a clear and credible valuation you can use before publishing.
estimation.marketRangeDesc: A reliable base to decide your price positioning.
estimation.noModelFound: No model found for this make
estimation.partialDataHint: Some fields are optional, but more detail improves estimate quality.
estimation.practicalTipDesc: Include usage and maintenance context for better valuation confidence.
estimation.quickJourneyDesc: Complete the steps and get a practical market valuation quickly.
estimation.readyAfterDesc: You can directly continue to publish with a recommended price.
estimation.readyNextDesc: After valuation, publish your vehicle with a recommended price.
estimation.recommendedPriceDesc: Ready to use to publish quickly on AutoNex.
estimation.referenceReadyUi: Valuation reference is ready (UI curated source).
estimation.reliableTransparentDesc: The tool combines reference profiles and market signals. Each estimate includes range and confidence.

estimation.usageAdviceText: Pick the closest usage profile for better consistency.
estimation.usageFrameText: These details help frame valuation relative to actual use.
estimation.vehicleIdentityLead: Provide key vehicle information to build a reliable and actionable estimate base.

publish.activationNote: Your listing will be activated after payment confirmation.
publish.advancedInfoDesc: Add these details to improve how your listing is perceived.
publish.advancedMediaHint: Add a video or virtual tour link if available.
publish.agencySpotlightDesc: Strengthen your brand presence on the portal (after approval). Dealer accounts only.
publish.agencySpotlightDescInstant: Strengthen your brand presence on the portal right after publication. Dealer accounts only.
publish.boostHonest: Selected boosts will be applied when listing goes live, subject to availability.
publish.boostHonestInstant: Selected boosts are applied at publication time, according to availability rules.
publish.boostPragmaticHint: Select only options you need now: you can publish without boost.
publish.buyCreditsAccordionHint: Open this section only if your balance is insufficient.
publish.buyCreditsHint: Manual payment: send amount then attach proof. No credit is added before validation.
publish.descriptionHint: Focus on fuel type, gearbox, overall condition and maintenance history.
publish.descriptionPlaceholderLong: Write a complete description in French…
publish.draftKept: Your draft remains saved: you can publish after obtaining credits.
publish.editBanner: You are editing an existing listing.
publish.editCostFree: Saving your changes is free. If listing was online, it will go back to review when content changed.
publish.editCreditsHint: Edit mode: no extra credits are charged. Paid visibility options cannot be modified here.
publish.editNotFound: Listing not found or not editable.
publish.editSuccessReview: Changes saved. Listing goes back to review before republication.
publish.essentialInfoDesc: Start with the fields that drive understanding and conversions.
publish.finalizeStepHint: Review cost, choose visibility options, then submit your listing for moderation.
publish.finalizeStepHintInstant: Review cost, choose visibility options, then publish your listing.
publish.guidedFlowHint: Complete each step to move forward smoothly.
publish.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits. Buy credits or reduce boost options.
publish.invalidStatusForPublish: This listing is no longer in draft and cannot be published from this flow.
publish.listingLocationHint: City and map point are required to publish.
publish.listingNotFoundForPublish: Listing not found or already removed.
publish.loadingDraft: Restoring your saved progress so you can continue exactly where you left off.
publish.loadingEdit: Loading this listing for editing. Photos and text will appear in a moment.
publish.mainFeaturesDesc: They help buyers filter and compare listings faster.
publish.mainPhotoFirst: Upload your best photos first. The first image becomes the cover by default.
publish.mapNeedVille: Select city first to position on map.
publish.mapNoCoordsForCity: Unable to place the map for this city. Check the city name or contact support.
publish.mapPublicHint: The map marker helps buyers locate your area.
publish.moderationBanner: AutoNex reviews all listings before publication. Cost: {cost} credits per submission (+ boost options). Description remains in French.
publish.needMoreCredits: Insufficient balance to submit this listing with selected options.
publish.newProgramHint: Use this for newly available stock.
publish.noDraft: Draft not found — reload the page.
publish.notAuthorizedForPublish: You are not authorized to publish this listing.
publish.otherFeaturesHint: Separate items with commas when listing multiple options.
publish.otherFeaturesPlaceholder: e.g. adaptive suspension, ventilated seats, head-up display…

publish.photoRequired: At least one photo (main photo) is required.
publish.photoUploadPartial: Some photos could not be uploaded
publish.prePublishModerationHint: We review every listing to protect catalog quality.
publish.priceDealHintDefault: A real price reduction can make your listing eligible for Great deals.
publish.priceDealHintIncrease: Increasing the price disables Great deals visibility until a new real reduction is applied.
publish.priceDealHintLowering: Your previous price is automatically preserved when you make a real reduction.
publish.publishBannerInstant: Direct publication on AutoNex. Cost: {cost} credits per submission (+ boost options). Description remains in French.
publish.stepDetailsHelper: Precise title, coherent price, and full vehicle identity build trust.

publish.stepMediaHelper: Prefer sharp photos and a strong cover to improve contact intent.
publish.stepVisibilityHelper: Review summary, adjust options, then send your listing for moderation.
